zh.Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Harding於1304年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其時，他的父親Ralph de Harding18歲，母親Mary Lamb de Prez23歲。他於大約1338年與Alice Horton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1372年4月2日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Harding was born in 1304, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Harding, was 18 and his mother, Mary Lamb de Prez, was 23. He married Alice Horton about 1338, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 2 April 1372, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Harding est né en 1304, à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Harding, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mary Lamb de Prez, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice Horton environ 1338, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1372, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

Er hat um 1338 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Horton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. April 1372 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Harding(이)가 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Harding(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Lamb de Prez(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 Alice Horton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1372년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Harding родился в 1304 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Harding было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Lamb de Prez, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Horton около 1338 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 2 апреля 1372 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
